grant_title: Mentored Research Grant Applications (Scientific Review Committee - MaineHealth)
deadline: Rolling (with quarterly review deadlines: January 12, 2026; April 13, 2026; July 13, 2026; October 12, 2026)
geographic_restrictions: MaineHealth Maine Medical Center (MMC) in Maine (US Northeast)
project_area: Human subjects research with scientific merit evaluation
demographic_requirements: Must be working with a MaineHealth MMC mentor (for trainee/junior faculty applicants)
eligibility_summary: Open to trainees and junior faculty at MaineHealth Maine Medical Center (MMC) who are working with a MMC mentor. Studies must be submitted to the SRC for review prior to IRB submission. Quarterly review meetings occur on the first Tuesday of February, May, August, and November.
